title: cerasus hixa
side_effects: Cerasus hixa can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of certain alkaloids. In some cases, excessive consumption may also lead to dizziness, headaches, and fatigue. Improper use can also cause an allergic reaction, resulting in skin irritation, itching, and inflammation. Furthermore, the unregulated use of cerasus hixa may interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions or causing unpredictable outcomes.
